name: iv2-utils
documentation:
# InternVideo2 Testing Utils

This package has some utils for IV2 Testing.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.read_json
documentation:
Read data from a JSON file and return it as a Python object.

Args:
    filename (str): The name of the JSON file to read from.

Returns:
    Any: The data read from the JSON file, as a Python object.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.write_json
documentation:
Write data to a JSON file.

Args:
    data (Any): The data to write to the JSON file.
    filename (str): The name of the JSON file to write to.

Returns:
    None

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.split_video_to_mp4
documentation:
Splits the given video (at video_path) into clips of size window_size and stores the output in output_dir

Parameters:
    video_path (string): The path to the MP4 video.
    output_dir (string): The output filder that will store the sliding window clips.
    window_size (int)  : The # of frames in each video.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.get_output_dir
documentation:
Takes the output directory created by split_video_to_mp4 and returns the sorted list of files.

Parameters:
    directory (string): The path to the directory containing the split clips.

Returns:
    list: the sorted files in the directory.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.pickle_read
documentation: Reads the content from a pickle file.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.pickle_write
documentation: Writes data (first argument) to a pickle file (second argument).

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.json_read
documentation: Reads the content from a JSON file.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.json_write
documentation: Writes data (first argument) to a JSON file (second argument).

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.jsonl_read
documentation: Reads the content from a JSONL file.

functions.name: iv2_utils.iv2.jsonl_write
documentation: Writes data (first argument, a list of dictionaries/objects) to a JSONL file (second argument).
